issue.title: GitClaw backup-catalog e2e 20260531T204411Z
issue.body:
@gitclaw /backup catalog

Live backup-catalog E2E.

Hidden backup catalog body token: NOECHO_BACKUP_CATALOG_20260531T204411Z
This should produce a deterministic backup catalog, update the backup branch, and keep raw issue text out of the report.
issue.author: AnandChowdhary
